task_params.title: Diabetes Education Outreach Handout Draft
task_params.content_brief: One-page bilingual outreach handout draft for diabetes education at a community event
handout_points: short intro on why diabetes prevention and control matter
3 everyday blood sugar tips with simple wording
healthy plate idea with culturally familiar foods
signs that mean someone should seek medical care
encouraging clinic follow-up and screening reminder
include English and Spanish section headers
